full_text:
### Plan for the summer vacation

- In order to avoid the lack of communication during the summer, book
 > a meeting with others and keep everyone updated about your
 > progress before you start the vacation.

### Perform Tribus analysis on the STELLAR dataset

- Rules for using Tribus

 - No need to remove columns that are not markers, Tribus will
 > automatically ignore them.

 - When making the cell type description table, only the markers
 > that have contributed to certain cell types need to be used

 - all markers in logic have to occur in input data

 - All cell types names (at least for the level names) have to
 > be unique

 - All level names (except the 1st level) have to appear in a
 > previous level as a cell-type

 - the levels (sheets) have to appear in the right order in the
 > logic table

 - all cell-type have to have at least one positive (1) marker
 > score

 - in the input data, cell_ID have to be in the first column

 - in input data, cell \_IDs should be unique

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
- Visualization functions for Tribus

 - What do we have now?

 - Heatmap to show marker correlations

 - Heatmap of median expression, with logic labels

 - UMAP colored with marker density and cell types

### How to organize the GitHub branches

- What to upload, how to manage, how to organize

 - Name branches with the name of the dataset we are using

rker density and cell types

### How to organize the GitHub branches

- What to upload, how to manage, how to organize

 - Name branches with the name of the dataset we are using

 - Put notebooks in the /notebook folder (make subfolders for each
 > dataset)

 - Teodora will remove old/useless files

 - Merge \<dataset\> branch with dev when everything works stable

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
- How to share the datasets we used on our personal PC

 - Datacloud \> farkkila \> Projects \> Tribus \> Test case data

### Plan for the future development

- **Teodora:** continue to optimize the visualization functions.

- **Ziqi:** update the cell type description table for STELLAR and
 > test the visualization functions on the STELLAR dataset.

 - Rename cell types

 - Remove some unnecessary markers

 - Fetch visualization functions from dev and test

- **Ziqi:** Upload the STELLAR dataset to farkkila datacloud.

- **Together:** Discuss the threshold for the undefined cell types, by
 > comparing the Tribus result with reference cell types of STELLAR
 > and TMA datasets.

- **Together:** Continue to find potential CyTOF datasets. Add your
 > suggestions here:
 > [[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ljiXV2-yLx-6zpvvhKWFJHJOZWSSNoMNOAccgGkuPhc/edit?usp=share_link]{.underline}](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ljiXV2-yLx-6zpvvhKWFJHJOZWSSNoMNOAccgGkuPhc/edit?usp=share_link)

V2-yLx-6zpvvhKWFJHJOZWSSNoMNOAccgGkuPhc/edit?usp=share_link]{.underline}](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ljiXV2-yLx-6zpvvhKWFJHJOZWSSNoMNOAccgGkuPhc/edit?usp=share_link)

- **Change the plan made on March 31st:** Instead of pre&post dataset
 > quality assessment, use Fernando's dataset as the main analysis
 > for the manuscript. (Will have a meeting with Fernando on April
 > 21st)
